g.text: Current state of color, type, spacing, and component tokens · Cena Health brand
Secondary · Sand --color-secondary-* / --color-sand-* (aliases neutral, gray, zinc, stone, slate)
Sage · Warm green identity (hue-shift from teal) --color-sage-*
★ LOCKED brand anchors · 400/500 = logo rings · 800 = "Cena" wordmark · sage-300 = logo inner ring
Typography · Plus Jakarta Sans (display) · Source Sans 3 (body) · Source Code Pro (mono)
Cena Health is a clinically integrated nutrition program. This is body-base copy at 16px using Source Sans 3.
Small copy carries captions, supporting metadata, and footnotes. Reads comfortably at 13.33px.
Extra-small tokens — labels, chips, overlines. Always paired with uppercase + tracking.
Badges · 7 color variants · uppercase tracked · rounded + pill
usage: status pills, care-plan tags, compliance flags, kitchen-run state
Card · flex-col · bg-gray-50 · border-gray-200 · rounded-xl · shadow-2xs
Your kitchen is finalizing this week's menu.
Form elements · default · focus · disabled · with helper + error
This ID is too short — expected 9–12 characters.
Use the address on file with your insurance.
Alerts · semantic surface treatments (50 bg · 200 border · 700 text)
Your provider approved the revised nutrition plan. Meals ship Monday.
Complete your weekly check-in to keep your delivery on schedule.
We couldn't confirm coverage. Upload a clearer photo of your card to retry.
New kitchen partner in your area
Lunaria Kitchen joined the network. You can switch providers on your next cycle.
